sourcesContent:
const normalizeText = (value) => String(value || "").trim().toLowerCase();

/** Wikimedia thumbnails where clubs are absent or ambiguous on api-sports. */
const WIKI_LOGO = {
  blackpool:
    "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/d/df/Blackpool_FC_logo.svg/330px-Blackpool_FC_logo.svg.png",
  bradfordPA:
    "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/6/62/Bradford_%28Park_Avenue%29_A.F.C._logo.png",
  bury: "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/6/65/Bury_FC_crest.svg/330px-Bury_FC_crest.svg.png",
  darwen: "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/f/fe/Darwen_FC_crest.png",
  glossopNE: "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/5/5e/GNE_afc_badge.png",
  grimsby:
    "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/d/db/Grimsby_Town_F.C._logo.svg/330px-Grimsby_Town_F.C._logo.svg.png",
  leytonOrient:
    "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/a/a8/Leyton_Orient_F.C._logo.svg/330px-Leyton_Orient_F.C._logo.svg.png",
  wimbledon:
    "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/b/b3/Wimbledon_FC_crest.svg/330px-Wimbledon_FC_crest.svg.png",
};

/** api-sports.io crest URLs (and a few Wikimedia URLs) keyed by normalized CSV / UI names */
